name: PELEC202 Midterm Topic 1 - Introduction to Web App Frameworks

questions.questionText: Sets of resources and tools for software developers to build and manage web applications.
2 types of Frameworks.
A type of Framework that is user-side, client-side.
A type of framework also known as server-side framework.
An architecture that runs on web server.
What kind of model is common in web development?
CSM layer that is created through JavaScript.
CSM layer that includes rules, business logic, and so on...
CSM layer that is responsible for operations.
CSM layer that safeguard the data.
5 Web App Architecture.

name: PELEC202 Midterm Topic 2 - Introduction to ReactJS

questions.questionText: A free, open-source JavaScript library for building User Interfaces.
Who was the lead developer of ReactJS?
Which company developed ReactJS? (New company name)
Which feature was ReactJS was first used?
One key benefit of react that makes it rank 1 in search engine.
Which year does React first introduced?
One main benefit of ReactJS is It offers developers an easy way to create applications with a lot of functionality at once? (True or False)
8 Key Benefits of ReactJS.
questions.answer: Virtual DOM, Components, JSX, One-Way Data Binding, Large Community Support, Easy to Understand, SEO-Friendly Framework, Mobile Development

questions.questionText: In ReactJS, ____________ only modifies the specific components that have been changed.
ReactJS allows developers to create reusable __________ that can be easily integrated into other parts of the application.
In ReactJS, _____ allows developers to define components in a simple and intuitive way. It also makes it easier for developers to understand the component hierarchy and makes the code more readable.

In ReactJS, ______ means that the state of a component can only be modified in one direction. This makes it easier for developers to manage the state of components and reduces the likelihood of unintended changes.

name: PELEC202 Midterm Topic 3 - Introduction to APIs

questions.questionText: A way for different software applications to communicate with each other by following a set of rules. (Acronym only).
What does API mean? (Acronym meaning).
3 Principles of RESTful APIs.
questions.answer: Stateless, Resource-Based URLs, Uses HTTP Methods

questions.questionText: Define the type of action a client wants to perform on a server when making an API request. These specify whether the request is meant to retrieve data, create new data, update existing data, or delete data.
3 status of Promises.
Tasks that take time to complete and do not block the rest of the program while waiting for the result.
A JavaScript object that represents the result of an operation that has not yet completed but is expected in the future.
Are modern JavaScript keywords that simplify working with Promises by allowing asynchronous code to look and behave like synchronous code.
